items.summary: Redeploy the backend Motoko canister so it transitions from a stopped state to a running state. The canister tgggy-siaaa-aaaag-auegq-cai is currently stopped (IC0508 / Reject code 5), causing all calls including getAllIncidents to be rejected. The canister must be fully redeployed and running so that both query and update calls are accepted without error.
